content.question: What is the current magnitude and geographic distribution of segregation (by ethnicity, socioeconomic status, disability type) in Hungarian schools that is specifically attributable to SEN/BTMN administrative classification and parent-choice responses, versus other mechanisms?
content.reduction_path: Conduct linked analysis of school-composition data, student-mobility records, and SEN/BTMN classification status to estimate the causal effect of SEN/BTMN labeling on school-switching and enrollment composition; disaggregate by region and school type
